APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!

Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.

Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for your departure date.
QUERIES?

Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd.

 Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis.
PROCESSING TIME

Please be informed that while every effort is made to process visa applications in a timely manner, the processing time may take up to three (3) weeks, particularly for applications lodged from Nepal, the Maldives, and Indian states outside Delhi, as highlighted below.

Please note the following standard processing timelines for visa applications:
- General Applications:
The standard processing time is 15 days.

- Cochin, Lucknow & Nepal Applications:
Applications from these locations may reach the Malta High Commission within 3 days after submission. This transit time is not included in the standard processing time.

- Maldives Applications:
Applications from the Maldives may reach the Malta High Commission within 6 working days after submission. This transit time is also not included in the standard processing time.

Kindly note that the processing period is calculated from the date the application is received at the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Applicants are also requested to allow an additional three (3) to six (6) days for the transmission of documents between VFS and the High Commission, and for their return to VFS.To avoid unnecessary delays, please ensure that:

- Application is complete
- Amendments or corrections are duly counter signed by the applicant; and
- All required supporting documents are submitted

If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global http://www.vfsglobal.com/malta/india/ (http://www.vfsglobal.com/malta/india/).VFS Helpline DetailsContact Number: 022 67866005 (08:00 hrs – 17:00 hrs) Monday to FridayE-mail ID: infomalta.northin@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomalta.northin@vfshelpline.com)Your correspondence should include:

- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number

Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
The short-stay visa is the most common Schengen visa. It entitles travellers, subject to the visa requirement, to enter the territories of the 29 Schengen States to pay a continuous visit or several visits (depending on the number of entries granted by the consulate), the duration of which does not exceed three months (90 days) in any half-year from the date of first entry in the Schengen area.
Applicants from Bangladesh are requested to submit their Short term Visa Application (C Type) with the Embassy of Italy in Dhaka.
You can apply for a visa minimum 15 days or maximum 3 months before your intended date of travel. Applicants are strongly advised not to confirm their travel arrangements until they have received
                                                            their visa. 
Please make a note of the below points before submitting your application at the Visa Application Centre:
- The applications should be submitted 15 days up to 3 months prior to the intended departure. For any exceptions you are requested to contact the High Commission directly by writing an e-mail visa.newdelhi@gov.mt (mailto:visa.newdelhi@gov.mt)

- Maltese/European Union/EEA family members that require a visa to visit Malta may write to :visa.newdelhi@gov.mt (mailto:visa.newdelhi@gov.mt) to set up an appointment.
- Photocopy of all pages of passports needs to be attached in application at the time of submission for all the categories
- Applicant needs to submit their old passports and if passport is lost (and not marked as lost on new passport) then police report (FIR) also is required.
- Applicants applying under Student visa need to submit the bank statements of last 06 months. Bank statements should be signed and stamped by bank, along with bank letter is mandatory.
Important Information: - Please refer the below mentioned points as instructed by Indian authorities, the High Commission of Malta:
- Old passport is mandatory for all the nationalities
- Visa Application Form for minors (under 18) needs to be signed by both the parents and ID proof of the parents
- NOC letters from parents should be in original
- Passports where alterations of the bio page or the validity of the passport is handwritten are not acceptable.
“Important information for applications lodged in India: as of 1 February 2018 a travel medical insurance will be accepted only if it is issued by one of the insurance companies mentioned in the list of approved companies. Please read carefully the following document:  “  List of approved Indian insurance companies”

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

EU-Regulation (Visa codex)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. (Please click here for approved Insurance Companies).
- Application can be submitted six (6) months prior to the date of departure.
- From May 1, 2010, only passports issued within the previous ten (10) years will be accepted.
- Passport must have at least two blank pages.
- Passport should be valid for at least three (3) months longer than the intended stay.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows business people to make a short business visit to Schengen during your visa validity period. Business activities may include a conference up to 90 days within a 180 day
                                                                        period from date of first entry.

## VISA FEES

[Table:   Business / Conference]

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2935/-
- The VISA Fees and VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay.
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 809/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 149/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3988/-.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Optional Courier + Assurance service is available at INR 1058/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 3240/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.

## Documents Required

Business/ Conference
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa.
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Adhaar Card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the itinerary.

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification  while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further  processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/UPo8B0SZYENmUVWXTJ6A4/946dbceef349c0a1ae870ec2315a3773/photo_160226.pdf)

## Processing Time

APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!

Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.

Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for your departure date.
QUERIES?

Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd.

 Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis.
PROCESSING TIME

Please be informed that while every effort is made to process visa applications in a timely manner, the processing time may take up to three (3) weeks, particularly for applications lodged from Nepal, the Maldives, and Indian states outside Delhi, as highlighted below.

Please note the following standard processing timelines for visa applications:
- General Applications:
The standard processing time is 15 days.

- Cochin, Lucknow & Nepal Applications:
Applications from these locations may reach the Malta High Commission within 3 days after submission. This transit time is not included in the standard processing time.

- Maldives Applications:
Applications from the Maldives may reach the Malta High Commission within 6 working days after submission. This transit time is also not included in the standard processing time.

Kindly note that the processing period is calculated from the date the application is received at the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Applicants are also requested to allow an additional three (3) to six (6) days for the transmission of documents between VFS and the High Commission, and for their return to VFS.To avoid unnecessary delays, please ensure that:

- Application is complete
- Amendments or corrections are duly counter signed by the applicant; and
- All required supporting documents are submitted

If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global http://www.vfsglobal.com/malta/india/ (http://www.vfsglobal.com/malta/india/).VFS Helpline DetailsContact Number: 022 67866005 (08:00 hrs – 17:00 hrs) Monday to FridayE-mail ID: infomalta.northin@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomalta.northin@vfshelpline.com)Your correspondence should include:

- Date of Birth

- Telephone Number

Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

Please be informed that while every effort is made to process visa applications in a timely manner, the processing time may take up to three (3) weeks, particularly for applications lodged from Nepal, the Maldives, and Indian states outside Delhi, as highlighted below.

Please note the following standard processing timelines for visa applications:
- General Applications:
The standard processing time is 15 days.

- Cochin, Lucknow & Nepal Applications:
Applications from these locations may reach the Malta High Commission within 3 days after submission. This transit time is not included in the standard processing time.

- Maldives Applications:
Applications from the Maldives may reach the Malta High Commission within 6 working days after submission. This transit time is also not included in the standard processing time.

## Overview
This category allows family member of EU nationals to apply for their Schengen visa from India.

## VISA FEES

[Table:   Business / Conference]

Please Note:
- The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2935/-
- The VISA Fees and VFS Service Charge can be paid via Cash/Visa/Master Card/Rupay.
- Optional Courier service is available at INR 809/-.
- Optional SMS service is available at INR 149/-.
- Optional Premium Lounge service is available at INR 3988/-.
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.
- All VFS Service Charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax – SGST @ 9% and CGST @ 9%.
- Optional Courier + Assurance service is available at INR 1058/-.
- Optional Form Filling service is available at INR 3240/-.
- VFS Charges (Logistics, Premium Lounge, Courier, SMS etc) are non-refundable.
Note: The services offered by VFS exclusively in relation to the submitting of the application do not have any effect on the issuance or refusal of the visa which is processed by the High Commission.

## Documents Required

Please click here for the documents
Your passport must not be older than 10 years Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant.
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- The Applicants/ Travel Agents/ Representatives are requested to fill the checklist and bring it along with the documents
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the itinerary.
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents.
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification  while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further  processing. Photo specification are given in the below link :
